Guard Menbuknar  

Guard
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded March 6th, 2010 by __DEL__1715559376468

/loc 945, -95

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2026-03-03 16:38:08.

Level: 10
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2026-03-03 16:44:02
Known Loot:
Bronze Bastard Sword
Kite Shield

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Increased:
  Gate Callers +10
  Craftkeepers +10
  Crimson Hands +10
  Deepwater Knights +10
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics -10
Quests:
  We Are The Dead!

Report a correction

Post Comment
Not meant to be killable
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2018 at 4:22 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I hit this guy with my cleric's undead DoT spell for over 1000 damage before giving up on him and only got him down to 95% health. At that rate, he would have to lose over 20,000 health to come close to dying. He also has crazy magic resist. I could only get my DoT to stick about half the time. How many other level 10 NPC's do you know of that have over 20k health?
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?

QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2017 at 4:33 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts

# Jun 05 2004 at 6:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570672657
26 posts
He is one of the two that gives the key to Paineel. Why are you killing them?

Edited, Sat Jun 5 19:52:57 2004
▲ Page top
key npc
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2018 at 4:14 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
gamejockey wrote:
He is one of the two that gives the key to Paineel. Why are you killing them?

Edited, Sat Jun 5 19:52:57 2004


For the faction hits and for the loot. There's a few PP worth of vendor trash on him. Kill him enough times and it adds up.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Guards out in newbie yard fight way above their con
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2003 at 8:43 PM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
I attacked one with my level 31 ranger. He conned green to me. All my hits didn't move his hp bar a bit and he was whacking me for 100 a pop. 100 a pop?? Freaking Hill Giants don't even hit me for 100 a pop anymore!! (They still kill me it just takes them a few seconds longer now, heh ;)) There is no way in hell that a green should be hitting me for that much and have so many hp that my best hits don't even move his hp bar down at all.

That gives me an idea. Why don't they make the warders to Sleepers Tomb level 1, but leave them with all the abilities and stats that they have now? That way nobody ever has to worry about the Sleeper being released, because nobody would ever bother to get their guild together for a raid on the warders because not only wouldn't they get any xp from killing the warders, but they would be on the same loot table as other level 1 mobs (snakes, bats, kobold runts, etc), so there would be no uber drops to go for either. Picture it, you and your guild have just spent many hours fighting you way through Sleepers, get to the room with the Warders, kill one after a long, seesaw battle, and here's your loot.

a cloth sleeves
a worn great staff
a ration
and
a short beer




Edited, Mon Sep 15 21:52:55 2003
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Not Invincible
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 6:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966285953
4 posts
I, the uber Monk killed him. Ok, the Pally helped a bit. Whatever, both of us were 56. The little spaz runs at 50%, does little circles around the noob zone.

Fight wasn't much harder than mobs we hunt for XP... course the ****** is green, but oh well. Damn Necro or SK or whatever in the room above was healin him with that lame wannabe-heal.

Dropped a Kite Shield & a Rusty Sword I believe. No key. =/ And he instantly repops at his spot on death.

Also, he doesn't want to follow you much past 20 feet or so far before he bolts back to his position. Spaz.
▲ Page top
Attitude change?
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2002 at 10:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361688730
4 posts
This guy aggro'd on me and killed me. There were many corpses there as well. I think something changed and now the trip to the warrens has become a bit more treacherous.
▲ Page top
YES
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2002 at 6:00 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
he is obviously an undercon because that is the noly way we can get to paineel, he wo'nt aggro cuz he is too low, he has stast of a lvl 40-50 but is a low con to eliminate aggro. i think thats why atleast
▲ Page top
them
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2001 at 7:13 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
they are that way so they wont argo on people going to warrens/ the hole and hit that hard so the newbies wont die
▲ Page top
and Guard Heridion too!
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2000 at 12:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just to reiterate what I posted for Guard Heridion:

Well, I went into the Paineel newbie zone the other day, and this guy (Heridion) and his partner (Menbuknar) conned green to me, a 23rd level dwarf paladin.

I killed a Heretic NPC, Noclin Saah, right in front of these guards, and they didn't move a bone. :-)

Then, I decided what the heck let's attack Heridion. So I did, and 5 blows of roughly 137 damage each later, I was dead. In under 5 seconds! I didn't even have the time to hit my Lay Hands hotkey and get the hell out of there.

To say that this is a mis-con of massive magnitude is an understatement.

I petitioned about this, and got the usual "because we can't verify this we can't help you" runaround.

Just to warn anyone out there...

Thunderhart
23rd season Paladin
The Nameless
▲ Page top
RE: and Guard Heridion too!
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2003 at 6:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789974715
Scholar
258 posts
This also applies to this guard (and probably any others you find there). Lvl 35 pally, killed Noclin Saah right in front of both guards and nothing happened. Green to me so I figured I would give it a shot. The only thing that applied to the 'green' con was that I was able to parry a number of rounds of strikes (like 3 or 4). He did anywhere from 60 - 143 hps of damage per strike when he did hit though. I was down to 47% health and ran like a bat out of hell to the Warrens zone. He never hit me again, so I must assume that I was either lucky or that speed isn't really something they have (no sow at the time btw). Sheesh. Green my *****
▲ Page top
RE: and Guard Heridion too!
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2001 at 1:02 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yep, this is a bug. I strolled in as a level 12 Ranger and he conned green. Five seconds later I was on a boat from Qeynos to get my corpse. Level 10 my %^*#!

Heeheheh.
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2000 at 3:28 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Aye, this guy is seriously screwed up, as is his counterpart.

I was level 29, he conned green, scowled at me, but did not attack. I thought "Hey! I'll waste him!"

Same thing, multiple hits for 100's. Fortunately, I made it to the zone before he killed me.
▲ Page top
Con is WRONG!
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2000 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This guy conned green to me at lvl 19, so I attacked him and he promptly hit me for 49, 137, 112, stunned, 124, then I died... NO WAY IS HE LEVEL 10; more like 40-50. BTW, I tried to petition for an XP res because this con was obviously a bug, and I waited an hour and NEVER got a response!
▲ Page top
RE: Con is WRONG!
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2003 at 9:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362059541
65 posts
You should try waiting longer, you're not the only one who petitions you know... For example, I have waited over 6 hours just to change my surname.. Another time, 4 hours to ask why a boat wouldn't dock... There are huge amounts of ppl on each server, not once have I heard of anyone getting a responce from a petition in less than 2 hours.
Just my 2cp

haha, con'd green to me at 16. I was trying to kill Noculn (sp?) and ran past em, double hit me and killed me. Should of binded nearby, had to run back from nk
